name: craft

owner.name: CETI — Center for Educational Technology Innovations

description: Senior-engineer code-quality guardrails for agentic coding — ten skills (nine composable guardrails + a production-grade router) plus an always-on rules constitution and a /senior-review gate that stop AI agents from shipping slop. Grounded in The Pragmatic Programmer, Fowler's Refactoring, Ousterhout's A Philosophy of Software Design, and empirical AI-code-quality research.

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Nine composable skills + an always-on rules constitution + a /senior-review gate. Forces strategic (durable) code over tactical (fast-but-disposable) code: code-smells detection, DRY/reuse discipline, effects-vs-purity separation, naming-and-comments, right-sized-design (anti over-engineering), robustness-at-boundaries, supply-chain-hygiene (catches hallucinated packages), trustworthy-tests, and data-and-state-evolution (safe schema/migration changes) — all orchestrated by a production-grade router skill. Use it FIRST on any 'is this production-ready?' or 'review this diff/PR' request.

author.name: CETI — Center for Educational Technology Innovations
